title: Credentials
subtitle: Auth tokens for HTTP requests — auto-attached when URL pattern matches.
security_note: Tokens NEVER appear in the LLM context or tool results. They are only injected server-side as headers when fetch_url targets a matching URL.
name: Name
name_invalid: Invalid — only a-z, 0-9, _ and -, max 50 chars.
value_hint_bearer: E.g. an API token. Sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <value>'.
url_pattern_hint: Glob: '*' = all URLs, 'https://forum.metin2.de/*' = only this host. Credential is only attached when URL matches.
ssh_private_key_hint: OpenSSH or PEM format. Stored encrypted, never passed to the agent.
ssh_host_hint: Host the agent should SSH into.
ssh_host_invalid: Only letters, digits, dots and hyphens allowed (max 253 chars).
ssh_user_invalid: Only letters, digits, dots, underscores and hyphens allowed (max 32 chars).
